rules.checklist_item: Address the 'Common Criteria' (Security) through risk assessment, access control, and monitoring; add Availability/Privacy as needed.
Maintain detailed audit logs, access review records, and incident response reports in a central repository for auditor review.
Define the boundaries of the Information Security Management System; conduct a risk treatment plan and Statement of Applicability (SoA).
Implement 93 consolidated controls across Organizational, People, Physical, and Technological themes.
Inventory all personal data; collect only what is necessary; implement clear retention and disposal schedules.
Establish procedures for individuals to exercise rights (access, erasure, portability) within a 30-day window.
Perform Data Protection Impact Assessments for high-risk processing, such as large-scale tracking or sensitive data usage.
